name: GPM Automation Console
summary: Local desktop console for managing and automating GPM Login profiles through the local GPM API.

health.note: Requires GPM Login local API at http://127.0.0.1:19995.

nextActions: Persist Run History to SQLite or a local JSON database.
Add workflow dry-run mode with no final submit for sensitive forms.
Add per-workflow run reports and screenshot viewer.
